title: Add test coverage for orchestrator/checkpoint.py
description: orchestrator/checkpoint.py implements the pipeline resume-on-failure mechanism (save, load, resume_from, find_resumable_run, clear) with zero test coverage. This is a critical reliability feature — if a bug is introduced, pipeline restarts will fail silently or restart from the wrong phase. All logic uses in-memory SQLite, so tests require no network or API keys.
requirements: tests/test_checkpoint.py covers save, load, resume_from, find_resumable_run, and clear
Tests use an in-memory SQLite connection (sqlite3.connect(':memory:'))
No network access or API keys required
context: Checkpoint stores state in the checkpoints table of traces.db. Use sqlite3.connect(':memory:') and pass it directly to Checkpoint(conn). Phase enum is in orchestrator.pipeline. PHASE_ORDER list defines valid phase sequence.
